# Morgan Hartley Consulting
> Swiss corporate law firm: company formation, tax, financial licensing, SECO permits, bank accounts, immigration.

## About
Morgan Hartley Consulting is a legal services firm based in Zug, Switzerland.
We assist companies and entrepreneurs with formation, licensing, taxation, compliance, and immigration.
Operating since 2003, we have assisted in forming over 500 companies in Switzerland.

## Authors
- Morgan Hartley (m.hartley@lawsupport.ch) — Swiss corporate lawyer, Swiss Bar (Canton of Zurich), LLM University of Zurich, lic. iur. University of Bern

## Key Topics
- Swiss company formation (AG, GmbH, branch offices, cooperative)
- FINMA licensing (banking, asset management, fund management, crypto)
- Swiss corporate taxation (corporate tax, VAT, withholding tax, cantonal rates)
- SECO work permits (personnel leasing, employment placement, EOR)
- Swiss immigration (B permit, C permit, L permit, family reunification)
- Swiss employment law and labour compliance
- Intellectual property (trademarks, patents, copyright, domain disputes)
- Swiss bank account opening for companies and individuals
- Shelf companies (ready-made AG and GmbH)
- Company liquidation and restructuring
- Due diligence and M&A in Switzerland

## Locations
- Baarerstrasse 135, 6300 Zug, Switzerland (main office)
- Zurich (secondary office)

## Contact
